broken_links_resolved.change: Fixed path resolution for ../ links — now resolves against file's directory, not WIKI_DIR
broken_links_resolved.rule_applied: Relative paths with ../* must be resolved using dirname(file) + realpath -m
broken_links_resolved.notes: Fixes #2 broken links (natural-memory.md → AGENTS.md, temporal-decay-in-wiki.md → issues.md)

broken_links_resolved.change: Removed invalid source path from frontmatter — sources field must not reference non-existent raw/github/
broken_links_resolved.rule_applied: EXT-LINK-V1: Never link to or source from raw/** unless files exist on disk. Replace with canonical external URLs.
broken_links_resolved.notes: Cleaned up stale meta-reference [raw/github/lee-to/ai-factory@2.x/] → replaced with actual GitHub/NPM URLs
Fixed to correct NixOS Wiki URL per issues.md #27 requirement

broken_links_resolved.rule_applied: raw/* links must exist on disk; when missing → replace with external GitHub permalinks
broken_links_resolved.notes: Fixed 3 broken raw-links to official GitHub docs. Also fixed link-validator.sh to check raw/* existence instead of skipping them.
All relative markdown links in ai-factory repo converted to GitHub permalinks. Process-ingest.json updated to call raw-link-repair.sh at step 1.

architectural_decisions.decision: source-manifest.json → meta/ (alongside registry, backlinks). Agent writes via script only.
architectural_decisions.reasoning: raw/** is protected for agent writes. meta/ uses existing pattern: rebuild through scripts (rebuild-meta.sh), not direct edit. Consistent with validate-path.sh guardrails.

Added Post-Operation Link Validation in Link Conventions section
